plain_language.what_this_is: The fixed set of stages a project moves through, so neither the owner nor the AI ever has to guess the next action. Each stage has a known entry, a known 'what to do now', a known way to exit, and only certain legal next stages. This is the map; lifecycle-state.json is the 'you are here' pin.
plain_language.how_it_reads: The system shows the current stage's 'what to do now' and only the LEGAL next stages. It never invents a next step outside this map, and it never auto-advances -- moving stages is a deliberate, recorded choice.
plain_language.adjustable: Stages/transitions can be refined, but keep them few and explicit.

stages.label: Define
stages.description: Decide what this project or feature actually is and why.
stages.what_to_do: Write the goal and the rough scope in plain language (PROJECT.md / a decision).
stages.exit_criteria: The goal and scope are recorded in repo truth.

stages.label: Plan
stages.description: Turn the goal into a ranked list of bounded pieces of work.
stages.what_to_do: Rank the work (COCKPIT_ROADMAP.md) and pick the single next bounded task.
stages.exit_criteria: One bounded next task is chosen, with a clear allowed scope.

stages.label: Work a task
stages.description: Build one bounded task, staying inside its declared scope.
stages.what_to_do: Implement the chosen task; snapshot (commit) as you go; stay in scope.
stages.exit_criteria: The task is built, tested, and committed.

stages.label: Verify
stages.description: Independently check the work before it counts as done.
stages.what_to_do: Run the checks / independent review; record an honest verdict.
stages.exit_criteria: A verdict exists: PASS advances; FAIL/INSUFFICIENT sends it back to Work.

stages.label: Close a phase
stages.description: A group of related tasks is finished and verified.
stages.what_to_do: Confirm the phase's tasks are all done and truth surfaces are current.
stages.exit_criteria: The phase is complete and recorded; decide whether to plan the next phase or mark a milestone.
stages.entry_gate_reason: Work only counts as done after an independent PASS newer than the latest commit (DECISION-012). Advancing here from Verify requires that fresh PASS.

stages.label: Milestone
stages.description: A meaningful, showable point worth marking.
stages.what_to_do: Summarize what's done and its impact; snapshot; show the roadmap grid.
stages.exit_criteria: The milestone is recorded; decide whether to hand off or plan more work.

stages.label: Hand off
stages.description: Prepare to continue in a fresh chat without re-briefing.
stages.what_to_do: Generate the new-chat handoff (Project view) and make sure work is backed up.
stages.exit_criteria: A ready-to-paste handoff exists and the repo is synced.

stages.label: Roll over
stages.description: A fresh chat picks up from repo truth.
stages.what_to_do: Start the new chat, paste the handoff, orient from PROJECT.md.
stages.exit_criteria: The new chat is oriented and ready to work.
